summary: Complete testing of Job Application (Careers) feature. All backend API tests (10/10) and frontend UI tests passed. Multi-step form works correctly including navigation, validation, conditional headshot field, and form submission.

issues: React hydration warnings in console about span elements being children of select/table elements - not affecting functionality but should be cleaned up for production

critical_code_review_comments: CareersPage.jsx correctly implements 3-step form with state management
Conditional headshot field works correctly - hidden for BOH and visible for FOH visual positions (Floor Manager, Bartender, Server, Hookah)
Backend POST /api/careers/apply correctly handles multipart form data with files
Resume and headshot files are stored as base64 in MongoDB media_files collection
All 8 locations and 8 positions are correctly configured
seed_data_creation: Created test applications with TEST_ prefix in job_applications collection for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Careers feature fully tested. All backend endpoints working (/api/careers/apply POST, /api/admin/careers/applications GET). Frontend multi-step form correctly handles validation, navigation between steps, and conditional headshot field. Applications are saved to job_applications MongoDB collection.

Homepage Careers Button.details: data-testid='careers-btn' button visible and navigates to /careers

Step 1 - Candidate Information.details: Name/Email/Phone required validation works, social fields optional, Next button works

Step 2 - Location Dropdown.details: All 8 locations present: Edgewood, Midtown, Douglasville, Riverdale, Valdosta, Albany, Stone Mountain, Las Vegas

Step 2 - Position Dropdown.details: 8 positions in 2 categories: FOH (Floor Manager, Bartender, Server, Hookah, Service Assistant/Dish Washer) and BOH (Line Cook, Utility/Dishwasher, Kitchen Manager)

Step 2 - Availability Grid.details: Mon-Sun x Morning/Evening/Late Night grid is interactive

Step 3 - Resume Upload Required.details: Resume upload section visible for all positions

Step 3 - Headshot Conditional.details: Headshot field hidden for BOH (Line Cook), visible for FOH visual roles (Server tested)

Backend POST /api/careers/apply.details: Accepts multipart form data, validates required fields, stores files in MongoDB, returns application ID

Backend GET /api/admin/careers/applicati.details: Returns list of all job applications with full details

Progress Bar.details: Progress bar shows correct step (red fill for completed/current steps)

Back Button Navigation.details: Back button from careers page navigates to homepage

Step Navigation.details: Next/Back buttons work between all 3 steps

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected
